user.title: CAME Domotic
user.description: If you need help with the configuration have a look here: {documentation_url}

dhcp_confirm.title: CAME Domotic server discovered
dhcp_confirm.description:
A CAME Domotic server was found at **{host}**.
Please enter your credentials to complete the setup.

abort.not_came_device: The discovered device is not a CAME Domotic server.

create_user.name: Create user
create_user.description: Create a new user on the CAME Domotic server.

config_entry_id.name: Config entry
config_entry_id.description: The CAME Domotic server to create the user on.

username.name: [%key:common::config_flow::data::username%]
username.description: The username for the new user.

password.name: [%key:common::config_flow::data::password%]
password.description: The password for the new user.

group.name: Group
group.description: The terminal group for the user. Use '*' for all groups.

delete_user.name: Delete user
delete_user.description: Delete a user from the CAME Domotic server. Cannot delete the currently authenticated user.

config_entry_id.name: Config entry
config_entry_id.description: The CAME Domotic server to delete the user from.

username.name: [%key:common::config_flow::data::username%]
username.description: The username of the user to delete.

change_password.name: Change password
change_password.description: Change a user's password on the CAME Domotic server. If changing the authenticated user's password, the integration credentials are updated automatically.

username.name: [%key:common::config_flow::data::username%]
username.description: The username whose password to change.

get_terminal_groups.name: Get terminal groups
get_terminal_groups.description: List available terminal groups on the CAME Domotic server. Call this before creating a user to discover valid group names.

config_entry_id.name: Config entry
config_entry_id.description: The CAME Domotic server to query.

user_not_found.message: User {username} not found on the CAME server.

cannot_delete_current_user.message: Cannot delete the currently authenticated user {username}.

group_not_found.message: Terminal group {group} not found on the CAME server. Use the get_terminal_groups service to list available groups.

service_comm_error.message: Communication error with the CAME server: {error}

service_auth_error.message: Authentication error with the CAME server: {error}
